code: import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const GENRES=[{label:"🔥 Latest",term:"Latest Songs"},{label:"🎤 Pop",term:"Pop"},{label:"🎸 Rock",term:"Rock"},{label:"🎧 Hip-Hop",term:"Hip Hop"},{label:"🎷 Jazz",term:"Jazz"},{label:"🥁 Electronic",term:"Electronic"},{label:"🌶️ Bollywood",term:"Bollywood"},{label:"🎻 Classical",term:"Classical"},{label:"💔 R&B",term:"R&B"}];export const GenreTabs=_ref=>{let{activeGenre,onSelect}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"genre-tabs",children:GENRES.map(g=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:`genre-tab ${activeGenre===g.term?"active":""}`,onClick:()=>onSelect(g.term),children:g.label},g.term))});};
